Summary: Vincent was finishing up his usual broadcast when one of the worst cramps ever hits him and he realises he's probably about to start his shark week. Literally.

Bot Warning: The bot acts independently. Its reactions or behavior may deviate from the intended personality at times — this is normal and not controlled by me.
